summary:
To reduce post-dressing removal sensitivity, it is essential to maintain oral hygiene focusing particularly on cleaning the root surfaces thoroughly while avoiding products like desensitizers right away as they may cause temporary heightened sensation. The primary goal here is preventing any additional irritation which can exacerbate discomfort during recovery. \boxed{C}
To manage post-periodontal dressing removal sensitivity effectively, prioritize thorough cleansing without irritating substances; this approach helps mitigate exposure-related sensitivities and supports healing conditions conducive for minimal pain perception. Therefore,\boxed{C}.
